summary: Deployment-readiness test of CandidateCardV1 rollout to Medalists + Category Explorer with icon-only Like/Follow/QT/Draft buttons. All 9 backend smoke tests pass; all 10 frontend assertions pass.

tests_executed.design_preview_route_removed: PASS — /admin/outreach/design-preview no longer renders 'Outreach Row Design Variants' heading; React Router logs 'No routes matched' (SPA fallback).
tests_executed.medalists_march_2026_cards: PASS — Selected Monthly -> 'March 2026 — 9 cats, 744 papers'; 10 candidate-card-* rendered including all 4 expected handles (@rainozhang, @gregorschub, @CapybaraPapers, @QFinancePapers).
tests_executed.four_icon_buttons_per_card: PASS — every Medalists card has like-btn-*, follow-btn-*, qt-icon-*, draft-btn-* present.
tests_executed.icon_button_sizing: PASS — outer button class is 'h-6 w-6' (24x24) per spec. Inner SVG glyph is h-3 w-3 (12x12) which is a normal centered-glyph pattern; button itself satisfies the 24x24 requirement.
tests_executed.tweet_text_color_coding: PASS — @rainozhang (6/0) blue=True; @gregorschub (229/46) blue=True; @CapybaraPapers (0/0) blue=False, muted=True; @QFinancePapers (2/0) blue=True. Logic 'tweet_likes+tweet_retweets > 0 -> text-blue-600 else text-muted-foreground' is correctly implemented.
tests_executed.engagement_numbers_top_right: PASS — heart + repeat-2 lucide icons and numeric counts visible top-right of each card (visible in screenshot: '6 0', '229 46', '0 0', '2 0').
tests_executed.qfinance_filled_pink_heart: PASS — like-btn-QFinancePapers wrapper class includes 'border-pink-500 bg-pink-50 text-pink-600' and inner svg has 'fill-pink-500'. Title='Liked — click to like again'.
tests_executed.category_explorer_no_draft: PASS — In Category Explorer (selected category, clicked Find Handles): 7 candidate cards rendered, each with like-btn/follow-btn/qt-icon, but 0 draft-btn-* selectors found (correct — Draft only in Medalists).
tests_executed.mobile_activity_tabs: PASS — 390x844 /admin/outreach/activity: no overflow; all three tabs (Quotes, Likes, Follows) present.
tests_executed.backend_outreach_smoke: 9/9 PASS — admin-gated medalists/activity/discoveries endpoints return correct shapes; follow-handle and like-tweet are properly admin-gated (401 without token) and validate payloads (400 on bad input). NO live X writes were performed.

critical_code_review_comments: OutreachPage.jsx is large (>1100 lines) — consider splitting CandidateCardV1, MedalistRow, PaperRow, QTIconButton, DraftIconButton, LikeButton, FollowButton into separate files for maintainability. Not blocking deployment.

design-preview route removal is clean: App.js no longer references the route and the OutreachDesignPreview.jsx file no longer exists; React Router shows the standard 'No routes matched' warning, which is the intended SPA fallback.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_outreach_smoke.py (new — pytest smoke for outreach endpoints; safe — no live X writes)
test_credentials: Admin password 'papersumo2025' via POST /api/admin/login; token returned in body and used as X-Admin-Token header. UI login via /admin/outreach.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing March 2026 monthly archive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medalists view requires switching to Monthly + selecting 'March 2026 — 9 cats, 744 papers' from the NATIVE <select> (not Radix combobox) to populate cards. Use page.select_option(value='2026-3'). The default selection is 'April 2026' which has 0 medalists. Live Like/Follow/Draft action buttons must NOT be clicked against real handles — they hit @KurateOrg's X account. Backend admin endpoint is /api/admin/login (not /api/admin/auth) and uses X-Admin-Token header (not Bearer).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works as designed. Initial confusion was that the period-selector is a native HTML <select>, not a Radix combobox; using native select_option fixed it.
